title: Reference Kidney Sample Collection
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"27jpo","text":"Inclusion:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1l8uq","text":"Minimal pathologic changes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dhkn7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2gamm","text":"Exclusion:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"31r","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9j1v2","text":"Evidence of hydronephrosis","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7de12","text":"Evidence of infectious disease","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bg4uv","text":"Proteinuria","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7g2pm","text":"Image artifacts","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8g78a","text":"\u003e5% Interstitial Fibrosis and Tubular Atrophy (IFTA)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Patient samples will be obtained from human kidneys, using nephrectomies from renal cancer patients. Tissue sections will be uninvolved and away from tumor areas. Sections will be screened by a pathologist to ensure minimal pathologic changes, and minimal image artifacts.

Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria: Inclusion: Minimal pathologic changes Exclusion: Evidence of hydronephrosis Evidence of infectious disease Proteinuria Image artifacts >5% Interstitial Fibrosis and Tubular Atrophy (IFTA)
creator: Nicholas Lucarelli
